forbidden_outputs: files written outside the explicit output_dir

backend_service.label: Backend Service
backend_service.description: HTTP or worker-oriented backend service with explicit boundaries for APIs and operational scripts.
agents_focus: implementer for endpoint skeletons only when approved
reviewer for regression and contract risk
example_usage: Document the initial API contract in docs/ before adding endpoints.
Use workflows/ to define release and verification steps without automating deploy.

frontend_app.label: Frontend App
frontend_app.description: UI-first application with emphasis on UX direction, structure and non-generic visual decisions.
agents_focus: reviewer for usability and regression risk
example_usage: Define the audience and visual direction in docs/ before building screens.
Keep shared UI rules in policies/ and keep runtime-specific components in app/ and ui/.

fullstack.label: Fullstack Project
fullstack.description: Split frontend and backend surfaces early so adapters and shared contracts stay explicit.
example_usage: Capture the first shared contracts in shared/ before implementation starts.
Use docs/ to define how frontend and backend evolve without leaking Atlas core into runtime.

internal_tool.label: Internal Tool
internal_tool.description: Operations-facing or workflow-oriented internal system with strong clarity around ownership and scope.
example_usage: Document the operator workflow in docs/ and reports/ before automating anything.
Keep repeatable procedures in workflows/ and decisions in memory/.

ai_agent_system.label: AI Agent System
ai_agent_system.description: Agent-oriented derived project that needs explicit orchestration, skill boundaries and evaluation paths.
example_usage: Describe the agent roles in agents/ before adding runtime implementations.
Use evaluations/ and prompts/ to keep testing and prompt intent explicit from day one.

rollback_manual: review the generated scaffold before using it
delete the generated output_dir manually if the scaffold is not needed
if deletion is blocked by the environment, move or clean it later with explicit filesystem access
validation_steps: metadata marks the project as atlas-derived-project
safety_limits: output_dir must be missing or empty before execution
do not write inside REYESOFT or its runtime paths
generate only minimal scaffold directories and metadata files
do not install dependencies, connect MCPs or execute runtime code
human_approval_triggers: the task asks for automatic dependency installation or deployment
the task asks to seed runtime business logic during bootstrap
